race.description: Jack Hirsch Memorial Yarra Valley Cup Handicap
race.comment: Competitive Yarra Valley Cup. Siding with one through some different form in SUNSETS (11). His first two runs this time in were very good, just holding his ground at his past two. He gets in on the minimum here and has the ability on his day. The other main chances come through the Wangaratta Cup, which was won by NEW YORK HURRICANE (3) in a good performance. With even luck from gate one he'll be very hard to hold out again. WYMARK (2) stuck on well for third there when firmly in the market and draws for a good trail. GREGOLIMO (9) split the pair in second at Wangaratta and will take catching around here. MY BROTHERS KEEPER (10) brings the SUNSETS formlines and has claims as well.
